# Latest AI Agent Self-Improvement Techniques (2025)

The field of self-improving AI agents has advanced significantly in 2025, with researchers organizing the space around **six main mechanisms** that enable agents to enhance their capabilities autonomously[1].
The most practical and widely-adopted techniques center on reflection-based learning and adaptive model architectures.

## Core Self-Improvement Mechanisms

**Reflection and in-loop feedback** remains the simplest and most effective approach[2].
